zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Margred Gwilym於1470年出生在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾時，她的父親Sir Rys ap Thomas21歲，母親Eva Verch Henry sw Gwilyn19歲。她於大約1494年與Sir Richard Herbert of Ewyas在威爾士卡馬特史爾結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和4個女兒的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Margred
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Margaret
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Margred Gwilym was born in 1470, in Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Rys ap Thomas, was 21 and her mother, Eva Verch Henry sw Gwilyn, was 19. She married Sir Richard Herbert of Ewyas about 1494, in Carmarthenshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 4 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Margred Gwilym est née en 1470, à Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Rys ap Thomas, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Eva Verch Henry sw Gwilyn, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Richard Herbert of Ewyas environ 1494, à Carmarthenshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 4 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Margred Gwilym 1470 in Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Rys ap Thomas 21 und ihre Mutter Eva Verch Henry sw Gwilyn 19. Sie hat um 1494 in Carmarthenshire, Wales Sir Richard Herbert of Ewyas geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 4 Töchter.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Margred Gwilymが1470年にイギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Rys ap Thomasは21歳，母Eva Verch Henry sw Gwilynは19歳であった。約1494年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアでSir Richard Herbert of Ewyasと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margred Gwilym(이)가 1470년 영국 웨일스 카마테실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Rys ap Thomas(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eva Verch Henry sw Gwilyn(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 대략 1494년 웨일스 카마테실르에서 Sir Richard Herbert of Ewyas(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Margred Gwilym родилась в 1470 г. в местности кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Rys ap Thomas было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Eva Verch Henry sw Gwilyn, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard Herbert of Ewyas около 1494 г. в местности кармартеншир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 4 дочери.
